dac67fb9-e82e-4cb0-84be-2245bc3519d7.command_text: Make it engaging - cut silence and speed up boring parts

user_intent.intent: Make the video more engaging by removing silence and speeding up boring sections

edits.reason: Remove ~1.96s silence to tighten pacing and sustain engagement.
Normalize overall loudness for consistent energy and clarity across the edit.

edit_plan.optimization_summary: Removed a 1.96s silence gap (aggressive pacing) while preserving intro/key points/conclusion, and applied full-track loudness normalization. Dropped the micro speed change to avoid imperceptible over-editing and potential cut adjacency issues.
validation_notes: Passed: Total cuts remove 1.96s of 10.0s (19.6%), within <40% limit (aggressive allowed).
Fixed: Removed 0.03s speed segment (4.99–5.02) because the change is imperceptible and begins at the cut boundary, risking <0.5s cut-spacing/over-editing concerns.
Passed: No remaining speed changes exceed 2x.
Passed: High-energy content preserved (silence removal only; intro/key points/conclusion unaffected).
Passed: Audio normalization across full timeline is reasonable and matches intent.
